name: Approval Queue
description: Generic, entity-agnostic moderation / approval queue. Any owning module can route an entity through human review via the queue (keyed by entityType + entityId) with a tamper-evident per-tenant decision hash chain and an in-memory decision-handler hook. Open items are PENDING / IN_REVIEW / ESCALATED; terminal items are APPROVED / REJECTED, with a partial unique index enforcing at most one open item per entity and SLA-by-priority due dates. Every decision is recorded in the append-only audit log; submitters are notified in-app and webhooks fire on each lifecycle event.
author: Kuray Karaaslan
